allow: Bash(pwsh -NoProfile -Command ". ./Generate-CFG.ps1; $cfg = Get-ScriptControlFlow -ScriptPath ''./in/in.ps1''; $cfg.Nodes | Select-Object Id, Type, Text, Line | Format-Table -AutoSize; $cfg.Edges | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(pwsh -NoProfile -c '. .\\Generate-CFG.ps1; $cfg = Get-ScriptControlFlow -ScriptPath ""in/in.ps1""; $cfg.Nodes | Select-Object Type, Text | Format-Table -AutoSize')
Bash(pwsh -NoProfile -c '. .\\Generate-CFG.ps1; $cfg = Get-ScriptControlFlow -ScriptPath ""in/in.ps1""; $cfg.Nodes | Select-Object Type, Text, VarsWritten | Format-Table -AutoSize')
Bash(pwsh -NoProfile -c '. .\\Generate-CFG.ps1; $cfg = Get-ScriptControlFlow -ScriptPath ""in/in.ps1""; $cfg.Nodes | Select-Object Id, Type, Text | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap')
Bash(pwsh -NoProfile -c '. .\\Generate-CFG.ps1; $cfg = Get-ScriptControlFlow -ScriptPath ""in/in.ps1""; $cfg.Nodes | Select-Object Id, Type, Text | Format-Table -AutoSize')
Bash(pwsh -NoProfile -Command ". .\\Generate-CFG.ps1; $cfg = Get-ScriptControlFlow -ScriptPath ''in/in.ps1''; $cfg.Nodes | Select-Object Id, Type, Text | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap")
Bash(pwsh -NoProfile -Command ". ./Generate-CFG.ps1; $cfg = Get-ScriptControlFlow -ScriptPath ''in/in.ps1''; $cfg.Nodes | Select-Object Id, Type, Text | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap")

Bash(pwsh -NoProfile -File - <<'EOF'
. ./Generate-CFG.ps1
$cfg = Get-ScriptControlFlow -ScriptPath 'in/in.ps1'
$cfg.Nodes | Select-Object Id, Type, Text | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap
EOF)

Bash(pwsh -NoProfile -File - <<'EOF'
$code = '"当前时间: $\({ Get-Date } | ForEach-Object { & $_ }\)"'
$ast = [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseInput\($code, [ref]$null, [ref]$null\)
$ast.EndBlock.Statements[0].PipelineElements[0].GetType\(\).Name
$ast.EndBlock.Statements[0].PipelineElements[0].Expression.GetType\(\).Name
EOF)
